stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 7/24 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃AI概念與傳產龍頭，金融股倒貨

stocks.description: 肖年仔，這檔AI指標股外資狂掃7.9萬張，擺明就是看好AI題材繼續燒，但小心別追高被倒貨。
傳產龍頭中鋼，外資也買了4.27萬張，這就是資金在找避風港，大盤震盪時，這種穩定的傳產股就成了香餑餑。
台塑也被外資買了2.86萬張，跟中鋼一樣，傳產龍頭股就是外資在作資產配置，穩穩賺的啦。
鴻海這大牛股，外資也買了2.37萬張，可能是在等蘋果新機題材，或是看好AI伺服器組裝的潛力。
台塑化外資買2.29萬張，油價沒噴，但傳產股就是外資的防禦性配置，肖年仔要學著點。
台化也買了1.98萬張，塑化三寶都進榜，外資這波對傳產龍頭的布局很明顯。
凱基金外資買1.84萬張，金融股雖然被外資倒貨不少，但這檔可能是有特殊題材，要再觀察。
中纖外資買1.73萬張，這檔也是塑化，外資對整個傳產族群的態度很積極。
記憶體華邦電外資買1.55萬張，這波記憶體有築底反彈的跡象，外資可能在卡位。
和碩外資買1.24萬張，電子代工廠，跟鴻海一樣，可能也是看好下半年電子旺季。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳行情鎖定金融與營建

stocks.description: 肖年仔，投信狂掃台新新光金1.44萬張，這擺明就是作帳行情，金融股是他們的愛將。
華南金也被投信買了1.09萬張，本土國家隊就是愛金融股，穩健又好拉抬。
彰銀投信買9595張，外資倒貨，投信卻在接刀，這就是內外資對金融股看法分歧的地方。
第一金投信買8666張，金融股幾乎被投信包圓了，肖年仔，跟著國家隊走，至少不會被割韭菜。
永豐金投信買6667張，金融股全面開花，投信這波作帳很用力。
營建股興富發投信買6574張，這檔也是投信的愛股，可能看好房市回溫或都更題材。
兆豐金投信買6183張，金融股就是投信的避風港，也是作帳的好標的。
統一投信買4998張，傳產龍頭股，穩健型配置，投信也喜歡。
中租-KY投信買3017張，這檔也是穩健型的金融租賃股，投信喜歡這種有獲利支撐的。
中信金投信買3010張，金融股就是投信的提款機，作帳必備。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：避險兼顧短線題材

stocks.description: 自營商買0050 4020張，這就是標準的避險盤，大盤不穩，先買ETF避險，肖年仔要學起來。
聯電自營商買2024張，這檔晶圓代工，可能是有短線題材或權證避險需求。
華南金自營商買1148張，跟著投信一起買金融，但量不大，可能也是權證避險。
緯創自營商買1079張，AI概念股，自營商也想分一杯羹，但量不大，小心隔日沖。
遠傳自營商買1047張，電信股也是防禦性標的，自營商在找穩定的。
群創自營商買981張，面板股有反彈跡象，自營商可能在抓短線。
中華電自營商買762張，電信三雄，穩健型標的，自營商避險配置。
台塑化自營商買739張，傳產龍頭，自營商也跟著外資腳步，但量不大。
興富發自營商買665張，營建股，跟著投信一起買，可能也是短線題材。
華新科自營商買630張，被動元件，可能也是短線反彈題材。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：AI概念股持續吸金與傳產龍頭避險
strategies.strategy_content: 外資大戶這波操作很明顯，一邊狂掃AI指標股緯創近7.9萬張，擺明就是看好AI題材在美股那邊（像GE Vernova提到AI帶動電力設備需求，KLA Corporation在半導體設備的地位）持續發酵，台灣的AI供應鏈當然跟著吃香。另一邊，又大買中鋼、台塑、台塑化這些傳產龍頭股，這就是資金在找避風港，大盤震盪或國際情勢不明（像油價沒噴，news_1），這些穩健的傳產股就成了外資的防禦性配置，進可攻退可守，肖年仔要學著點。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：投信作帳行情鎖定金融與營建
strategies.strategy_content: 本土國家隊投信這幾天根本是把金融股當自家廚房在掃貨，台新新光金、華南金、彰銀、第一金、永豐金、兆豐金、中信金，幾乎把金融股前段班都買了一輪，總計買超超過6萬張。這就是標準的季底作帳行情，金融股股性穩、權值大，好拉抬又不容易被套牢，是投信衝績效的愛將。同時，營建股興富發也買了6574張，可能看好房市回溫或都更題材，這兩大族群就是投信的重點布局。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：自營商避險兼顧短線權證操作
strategies.strategy_content: 自營商這幫人，最愛玩權證跟短線套利。你看他們買超元大台灣50 (0050) 4020張，這就是標準的避險盤，大盤不穩先買ETF避險，降低風險。同時，他們也買進聯電、緯創這些電子股，還有華南金、台塑化等傳產，但買超張數相對零散，這很可能是為了權證避險或短線價差操作。肖年仔，自營商的單子通常都是隔日沖或短線進出，別傻傻跟著追高。

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，外資狂掃AI跟傳產龍頭，投信猛攻金融作帳，自營商則在避險兼玩短線。大盤震盪，資金流向很清楚，別黑白買，看懂主力動向才不會被割韭菜！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 高盛這外資大咖，狂買緯創2.76萬張，擺明就是看好AI題材繼續噴，這就是真外資的長線布局，肖年仔可以參考，但別傻傻追高。
凱基台北這分點，買超0050 1.6萬張，這傢伙是出了名的隔日沖大戶，買ETF可能是為了避險，也可能是短線套利，但他們很少做長線，肖年仔別被騙了。
元大投信買超台新新光金6.51萬張，這就是本土國家隊在作帳，金融股是他們的愛將，穩健又好拉抬，肖年仔跟著投信走，至少不會太慘。
摩根大通這外資大戶，狂倒彰銀7.33萬張，跟投信對作，這就是外資在調整部位，從金融股撤出，肖年仔要小心，別去接這種刀。

english_professor_news.title: The oil spike everyone feared never showed up
english_professor_news.level1_blind:
Forecasting is mostly a way of buying peace of mind. You want a number for the worst case so you can decide how frightened to be, and once you have that number, you quietly stop thinking and start bracing for it.

That instinct is not irrational. It is how you decide whether to refinance, whether to take the job across town, whether the August road trip is still on.

When the United States and Israel struck Iran on Feb. 28, Tehran shut the Strait of Hormuz, the narrow channel that carries roughly a fifth of the world's oil and refined products. The forecasts that followed were not subtle. Trading desks talked about crude at $150 a barrel. Some of them talked about $200.

You ran that math in your head. Most drivers did. One tank, times 52 weeks, times two cars in the driveway.

Five months later, that number still has not shown up. Brent crude futures peaked around $126 a barrel, comfortably below the 2008 record of $147, and averaged roughly $101 between the start of the war and June 11, before briefly retreating to prewar levels near $70 in early July, according to Reuters.

The distance between that forecast and your actual receipt is one of the most underrated personal finance stories of the year. It is also worth real money to you.

Start with what a closed Hormuz is supposed to mean. About 20% of the world's oil and refined products move through it, and before the war, 100 to 130 ships passed through the waterway daily, according to AAA. Traffic has been a fraction of that for most of the year.

That is the textbook definition of a supply shock. The textbook says prices go vertical and stay there.
english_professor_news.level2_context: 美國與以色列對伊朗發動攻擊後，伊朗關閉海峽，導致全球石油供應量短缺。這個事件引發了廣泛的討論，許多人預測石油價格會上升，但事實上，石油價格卻沒有達到預期的水平。

level3_translation.sentence: Forecasting is mostly a way of buying peace of mind.
level3_translation.translation: 預測是買平安心的一種方式

level3_translation.sentence: You want a number for the worst case so you can decide how frightened to be,
and once you have that number, you quietly stop thinking and start bracing for it.
level3_translation.translation: 並且一旦你得到了最差的情況下的數字，你就會放心地停止思考，開始準備好

level3_translation.sentence: Five months later, that number still has not shown up.
level3_translation.translation: 五個月後，這個數字仍未出現

level3_translation.sentence: Brent crude futures peaked around $126 a barrel.

level3_translation.sentence: comfortably below the 2008 record of $147.

level3_translation.sentence: and averaged roughly $101 between the start of the war and June 11,
before briefly retreating to prewar levels near $70 in early July, according to Reuters.

level3_translation.sentence: The distance between that forecast and your actual receipt is one of the most underrated personal finance stories of the year.

english_professor_news.title: GE Vernova stock drops despite surging AI-driven orders as wind segment drags
english_professor_news.level1_blind:
Why the stock is moving: The gas turbine maker's quarterly results failed to impress investors with earnings missing expectations. Quarterly revenue beat estimates while the company saw a jump in orders for power and electrification equipment.

"With a backlog of $176 billion, continued revenue growth and margin expansion, and significant free cash flow generation, GE Vernova's momentum is building, and we are raising our 2026 financial guidance," CEO Scott Strazik said.

The company now sees revenue of $45.5 billion to $46.5 billion for the year, versus a previous forecast of $44.5 billion to $45.5 billion.

GE Vernova's total company orders surged 88% to $24.2 billion, driven by massive demand in its Power and Electrification segment.

The company's wind unit, however, dragged on earnings, with a 40% drop in new orders and higher offshore project costs.

What else you should know: Gas turbines have emerged as one of the hottest segments in the industrial market, powering the booming artificial intelligence infrastructure build-out and the onshoring of manufacturing.

The company has been dubbed the 苹公市 for the electric power industry, offering everything from natural gas turbines for generating electricity to power plant and grid modernization services.

Since the beginning of 2026, the stock has rallied more than 65%, hitting an all-time high in April.
english_professor_news.level2_context: 起丿程市的標四送。我一中章可的学公吃起公的学公。

english_professor_news.title: What Makes KLA Corporation (KLAC) an Attractive Bet?
english_professor_news.level1_blind:
Bristol Gate Capital Partners, an investment management company, published its Q4 2025 investor letter for the “US Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the Sɥ0 500 Total Return Index in the quarter in terms of returns, but outperformed in dividend growth. Despite debate over capital cycle returns, AI remained the dominant market theme, expanding from early adoption to broader enterprise adoption. The firm continues to focus on high-dividend-growth companies while maintaining discipline around valuation and earnings durability. In addition, please check the Fund’s top five holdings to know its best picks in 2026.

In its Q2 2026 investor letter, Bristol US Equity Strategy highlighted KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) as a newly added position. KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is a global manufacturer and distributor of process control, process-enabling, and yield management solutions for the semiconductor and electronics industries. On July 21, 2026, KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) closed at $217.56 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $284.19 billion. KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) posted a one-month return of -9.53%, while its shares gained 142.52% over the past 52 weeks.

Bristol US Equity Strategy stated the following regarding KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) in its Q2 2026 investor update:

KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is a dominant provider of process-control and metrology equipment to the semiconductor industry, with a high market share that becomes more entrenched at each node transition. Metrology is the precision measurement and evaluation of nanoscale features; as chip-making and architecture grow more complex, the economic cost of yield loss rises sharply, which makes KLA's tools effectively non-discretionary for leading-edge manufacturers. Those tailwinds, combined with prudent management, support strong dividend growth.

KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 71 hedge fund portfolios held KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) at the end of the first quarter, up from 67 in the previous quarter. While we acknowledge the potential of KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

In another article, we covered KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) and shared the list of best NASDAQ 100 stocks to buy other than SpaceX. Vltava Fund sold its position in KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) during Q2 2026, due to valuation concerns. In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q2 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.

READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and 15 Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years.

market_linker_insight.market_connection: 在股市和能源市場中，兩者的變化往往會對彼此產生影響。如今的油價下降已經使得許多投資者重新評估了其對於能源行業的信心，而這種情況反過來也會影響到股市。因此，當我們觀察到油價的變化時，我們不僅需要考慮其對於能源行業的影響，也需要關注它如何影響股市的整體趨勢。同時，能源市場的變化也可能會對股市產生波動，這種波動往往是由於投資者在評估公司財務表現和未來預測時，對於能源成本的考慮而產生的意見分歧所致。因此，在觀察到能源市場的變化時，我們不僅需要關注其對於能源行業的影響，也需要注意它如何影響股市的整體趨勢和投資者意見。
